title: Plan tasks in the right order
intro: These free tools help you line up documents, moving tasks, and first-week admin so dependencies don’t block you.

items.reason: Clarify paperwork before you need it for visas, housing, or the gemeente.
Break the move into phases so nothing critical is left to the final weeks.
Sequence registration, banking, and insurance after you land.

disclosure: These are free tools on this site, not paid placements.
